title: Sweet Child O' Mine
funFacts: The iconic opening guitar riff was created by [artist:Slash] while he was just practicing and warming up. [artist:Axl Rose] heard it and immediately started writing lyrics. The song was written about Axl's then-girlfriend Erin Everly. The music video was filmed at the Los Angeles Memorial Coliseum. The song appears on [album:Appetite for Destruction] from [date:1987].
